About Me

Background & Profile

A Software Engineering graduate from Universiti Malaysia Pahang Al-Sultan Abdullah (UMPSA) with a strong academic record (CGPA 3.31, Dean's List) and hands-on industry experience through a 6-month AI & Digitalization internship at TNB Renewables Sdn. Bhd.

I completed both my Diploma in Computer Science and Bachelor's Degree in Software Engineering at UMPSA — a dual qualification demonstrating consistent academic commitment. During my degree internship, I independently developed and deployed a production Flask web application now used by the HR department.

I am passionate about building systems that solve real problems, writing clear technical documentation, and continuous learning in AI, cloud, and cybersecurity domains.

Selected Work

Projects

01

TNB Trainee Access Card System

Full-stack Flask web application replacing a manual HR process that took up to one month. Features online form submission, automated PDF generation matching the official TNB Lampiran I layout, and automated email delivery to the HR department.

★Production deployment — actively used by TNB Renewables HR department
PythonFlaskReportLabPillowJinja2Bootstrap 5JavaScriptRender.com
02

Automated PDF Generation System

ReportLab-powered PDF engine that generates official TNB Lampiran I forms with pixel-precise layout, embedded passport photos, and canvas-drawn digital signatures.

PythonReportLabPillowHTML5 Canvas API
03

Email Automation Module

Python smtplib module that auto-delivers completed access card forms and all supporting documents to HR upon submission. Engineered for Render.com headless environment without keyring dependency.

PythonsmtplibFlaskRender.com
04

SRS Documentation — 3 Enterprise Systems

Authored draft Software Requirements Specifications for Solar Land Database Dashboard, HSE Reporting Dashboard, and Procurement Process Automation System (PPAS) for TNB Renewables Sdn. Bhd.

★Real enterprise deliverables for TRe internal systems
SRSSDLCRequirements AnalysisStakeholder Interviews

All projects were developed during the AI & Digitalization internship at TNB Renewables Sdn. Bhd.
